items.title: AAON, EMCOR, Caterpillar, WESCO, and Quanex Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
items.description: A number of stocks fell in the morning session after markets became increasingly wary of high valuations following a significant AI-driven rally.

items.title: Caterpillar lifts revenue & CapEx targets, DraftKings downgraded
items.description: Yahoo Finance anchor Josh Lipton tracks Tuesday's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute. Caterpillar (CAT) is lifting its targets for revenue, profit margins, and capital expenditures. Yum! Brands (YUM) reported earnings that beat estimates. DraftKings (DKNG) and Flutter Entertainment (FLUT) were downgraded by Bank of America. Stay up to date on the latest market action, minute-by-minute, with Yahoo Finance's Market Minute.

items.title: Caterpillar Targets Bigger Sales Growth Through 2030
items.description: Caterpillar is looking to accelerate its annual sales growth through 2030 and beef up its capital spending on capacity and digital technology.

items.title: Dow rises 200 points after AI trade recovers, Supreme Court shows doubt on Trump tariffs: Live updates
items.description: Stocks were relatively unchanged as valuation concerns around the AI trade persisted after chipmaker AMD posted its latest quarterly results.
